challenge.title: Korak 72
challenge.description: Kreiraj izraz/deklaraciju if koji proverava da li self i other nisu u istoj klasi i vraća NotImplemented.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Trebalo bi da kreirate izraz if koji proverava da li self i other nisu u istoj klasi objekata.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
node = _Node(_code).find_class("R3Vector").find_function("cross").find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[0]
conditions = ["type(self) != type(other)", "type(other) != type(self)", "self.__class__ != other.__class__", "other.__class__ != self.__class__"]
any(node.is_equivalent(condition) for condition in conditions)
`)) })

challengeFiles.name: main
